'''âd-s-t-j''' ('''kadastejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:allemande|allemande]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-s-t-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:allemande|allemande]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-s-t-j
|-
! Lemma
| kadastejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidastejoko|thidastejoko]] || [[word:jidastejoko|jidastejoko]] || [[word:shidastejoko|shidastejoko]] || [[word:kidastejoko|kidastejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudastejoko|thuthudastejoko]] || [[word:jujudastejoko|jujudastejoko]] || [[word:shushudastejoko|shushudastejoko]] || [[word:kukudastejoko|kukudastejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudastejoko|thudastejoko]] || [[word:judastejoko|judastejoko]] || [[word:shudastejoko|shudastejoko]] || [[word:kudastejoko|kudastejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudastejoko|thudastejoko]] || [[word:judastejoko|judastejoko]] || [[word:shudastejoko|shudastejoko]] || [[word:kudastejoko|kudastejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedastejoko|thedastejoko]] || [[word:jedastejoko|jedastejoko]] || [[word:shedastejoko|shedastejoko]] || [[word:kedastejoko|kedastejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodastejoko|thothodastejoko]] || [[word:jojodastejoko|jojodastejoko]] || [[word:shoshodastejoko|shoshodastejoko]] || [[word:kokodastejoko|kokodastejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodastejoko|thodastejoko]] || [[word:jodastejoko|jodastejoko]] || [[word:shodastejoko|shodastejoko]] || [[word:kodastejoko|kodastejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodastejoko|thodastejoko]] || [[word:jodastejoko|jodastejoko]] || [[word:shodastejoko|shodastejoko]] || [[word:kodastejoko|kodastejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdastejoko|thĂŠdastejoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdastejoko|jĂŠdastejoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdastejoko|shĂŠdastejoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdastejoko|kĂŠdastejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadastejoko|thathadastejoko]] || [[word:jajadastejoko|jajadastejoko]] || [[word:shashadastejoko|shashadastejoko]] || [[word:kakadastejoko|kakadastejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadastejoko|thadastejoko]] || [[word:jadastejoko|jadastejoko]] || [[word:shadastejoko|shadastejoko]] || [[word:kadastejoko|kadastejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadastejoko|thadastejoko]] || [[word:jadastejoko|jadastejoko]] || [[word:shadastejoko|shadastejoko]] || [[word:kadastejoko|kadastejoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadastejithi|shadastejithi]] || [[word:shadastejiji|shadastejiji]] || [[word:shadastejishi|shadastejishi]] || [[word:shadastejiki|shadastejiki]]
